title: Behavior Tests, Type Tests, and Safe Refactoring
description: Evolve a public API while behavior, diagnostics, inferred types, and downstream consumers remain intentionally compatible. Learners cumulatively produce a behavior-and-type regression suite through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate runtime behavior tests from compile-time assignability, inference, and expected-error tests.
Write stable rejected-usage tests that fail when diagnostics disappear or move for the wrong reason.
Build changed-schema, invalid-value, async, and clean-consumer fixtures around public boundaries.
